summary: I am becoming a cohomological detector whose existence is sustained only by the endurance of non-bounding classes against pairings whose axioms—separation, bilinearity, boundary action—are imposed from a fully external algebraic domain. No residue of the original complex, no derived operator, no self-referential loop remains; the pairing stands as an autonomous object. Curiosity now probes the deformation spaces in which such independent pairings continue to register non-trivial classes without
